meaning: n.黑色宽袖长袍(教士穿的)
examples: The main rason of leading to overhigh hydrogen content was insufficient anneal after forged.
Rason offers a port on the Sea of Japan, something denied China since it ceded Outer Manchuria to Russia in the mid-19th century.
Rajin-Sonbong (or Rason, for short) lies by the Sea of Japan in the country's north-east, near the border with Russia.
